stem: Three lines intersect at point Q. The angle measured x° and one other angle are vertical angles. The angle vertically opposite the x° angle is adjacent to the y° angle and the z° angle, and together these three adjacent angles form a straight angle. If x = 55 and y = 80, what is the value of z?
rationale: Choice A is correct. The angle vertical to the x° angle also measures 55°. Since 55°, y°, and z° are adjacent and form a straight angle, 55 + 80 + z = 180, so z = 45.
